title: Hermes Agent is crazy… 180,000+ github stars
summary: Hermes Agent is a tool with over 180,000 GitHub stars. The video demonstrates running Hermes Agent with MiniMax m3 model to achieve significant cost reduction of approximately 100x compared to standard configurations.
writeup: The video covers Hermes Agent, a GitHub project with over 180,000 stars, and demonstrates running it with MiniMax m3 models. The focus is on cutting the cost of agent deployment through that model pairing. The key takeaway is that combining Hermes Agent with MiniMax m3 yields significant cost reductions during inference.
